title: festuca clarkei
intro: Festuca clarkei, also known as Clarke's fescue, is a species of grass native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca clarkei are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
